source.authority: local itemTypes + EVE University skill tables + EVE Ref descriptions + local dogma requirements
notes: The local CCP client mirror contains expertSystems.fsdbinary loader code but not an extracted JSON table. This file is the single server-side authority consumed by runtime code.
Rows with explicit EVE University skill tables use those skill levels directly. Newer description-only systems use local dogma required-skill closure for the associated ship/module types.

expertSystems.name: QA ES below starting skills Afterburner II
QA ES above starting below alpha max Archaeology II
QA ES omega only Archaeology IV
QA ES ship unlock Gallente Battleship I
QA ES module unlock Medium Autocannon V and Specialization
QA ES ship attribute bonus max velocity Navigation IV
